tasks.subject: Task 1: Write the failing black-box test (TDD red)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Establish a failing test that proves partial state is persisted today (no `@Transactional`).

**Files:**
- Create: `maia-showcase/app/src/test/kotlin/org/maiaframework/showcase/many_to_many/LeftManyTransactionBlackBoxTest.kt`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Test compiles and runs
- [ ] Test **fails** — `leftManyDao.count()` returns 1 after the failed POST (entity was not rolled back without @Transactional)

**Verify:** `./gradlew :maia-showcase:app:test --tests "org.maiaframework.showcase.many_to_many.LeftManyTransactionBlackBoxTest" 2>&1 | grep -E "PASSED|FAILED|BUILD"` → `FAILED`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["maia-showcase/app/src/test/kotlin/org/maiaframework/showcase/many_to_many/LeftManyTransactionBlackBoxTest.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew :maia-showcase:app:test --tests \"org.maiaframework.showcase.many_to_many.LeftManyTransactionBlackBoxTest\" 2>&1 | grep -E \"PASSED|FAILED|BUILD\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Test compiles and runs", "Test FAILS — entity is persisted despite join failure"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Add @Transactional to renderer, regenerate, verify test passes (TDD green)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire `@Transactional` into `CrudServiceRenderer`, regenerate showcase service, confirm the black-box test goes green.

**Files:**
- Modify: `maia-gen/maia-gen-spec/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/spec/definition/Fqcns.kt`
- Modify: `maia-gen/maia-gen-generator/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/renderers/CrudServiceRenderer.kt`
- Regenerated: `maia-showcase/service/src/generated/kotlin/main/org/maiaframework/showcase/…`
